experiment: T3 iter25b — Cross-dataset zero-shot transportability on PADS, FIXED acc convention + drop gait_reg + frame-invariant tracks + RightWrist-only + sanity-checked

fixes_vs_iter25.A_match_acc_convention: WG: R_Wrist_FreeAcc_E/N/U (gravity-removed, Earth, m/s²); PADS: ×9.81 (g → m/s²). Both gravity-removed in m/s².
fixes_vs_iter25.B_drop_gait_reg: Removed step_t/stride_t/cadence/step_reg/stride_reg — meaningless on PADS stationary tasks.
fixes_vs_iter25.C_keep_5_tasks: WG keeps all 5 tasks (averaging); restricting to Balance loses too much data.
fixes_vs_iter25.D_rightwrist_only: PADS RightWrist-only (no LeftWrist fallback) — eliminates mirror-axis ambiguity for per-axis features when device-frame axes flip L vs R.
fixes_vs_iter25.E_sanity_checks: Verify PADS sampling rate from Time-column delta matches JSON sampling_rate (±5%); verify PADS acc is gravity-removed (mean magnitude in g < 0.5).
fixes_vs_iter25.F_add_magnitude_only_track: Add Track A3 (magnitude-only wrist_am_* features) — frame-invariant; cleanest cross-dataset comparison per codex+gemini consults flagging Earth-NEU vs Device-XYZ axis mismatch.

tracks: A2 — V2-wrist LGB regressor on FreeAcc features (per-axis + magnitude)
A3 — V2-wrist LGB on MAGNITUDE-ONLY features (frame-invariant; primary headline)
A3D2 — magnitude-only AND dimensionless (most rigorous frame+unit-invariant)
B2 — iter5 Stage 1+2 with PADS clinical imputation
D2 — V2-wrist LGB on dimensionless features only (robustness check)
headline_metric: AUROC of continuous predictions vs PADS PD/HC binary label
comparison_to_iter25_AUROC_0_5166: If iter25b A3 ≥ 0.55 → iter25 was measurement artifact (units + frame); if iter25b A3 ≈ 0.52 → iter25 verdict stands.
lockbox_rules: Architecture FROZEN before any PADS evaluation.
All 4 tracks (A2, B2, C2, D2) evaluated in ONE batch; reported regardless of AUROC.
Direct comparison vs iter25 AUROC=0.5166 to determine if iter25 was measurement artifact.
